conditions: construct, repair, analyze, or audit a Neuron Track Hours workbook
attribute monthly Neuron Track Hours across task workstreams
apply or verify a month-specific NTH rule pack
build the evidence-rich working artifact before management delivery
forbidden_conditions: active month cannot be identified and no month-specific confirmation is available
attendance or roster source of truth is unavailable
request would mutate a historical source workbook without explicit authorization

conditions: management or client-facing Neuron Track Hours send copy is requested
reduce a validated internal NTH workbook to the active month client tab contract
prepare a decision-ready NTH package without internal allocation or forensic surfaces
forbidden_conditions: no validated internal NTH workbook exists
active month client-facing tab contract is unknown
client projection would change attendance totals, dates, or governed task attribution
